name: sanka-plugin
description: Sanka CRM plugin with MCP-powered contact and company discovery skill using OAuth sign-in.

interface.shortDescription: Search Sanka contacts and companies from Codex with OAuth
interface.longDescription: Use Sanka's hosted MCP endpoint and a read-only CRM skill to find contacts and companies from Codex through a browser-based OAuth sign-in flow without exposing write actions.
defaultPrompt: Find a company in Sanka by name
List recent contacts that match a search term
Search Sanka CRM for contacts and companies
